Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 7}You can {f 0 1 2}dash{f 0 1 27} by pressing and holding {f 1 3 118} while moving. You'll cover ground more quickly, making your exploration of Tartarus more efficient.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}However, {f 0 1 2}enemies will spot you more easily when dashing{f 0 1 27}, so be careful.[n]{f 1 1}
